JVK Motors — Model One · Electric

Engineered to move.

Scroll

A lighter way through the city — zero emissions, instant torque, and a frame built around one idea: ride further on less.

Why JVK

Built for the
ride ahead.

Every part of the Model One is shaped by one question: what does a rider actually need on the way to work, and nothing more.

120 km range

A single charge carries you across the whole city and back, with enough left over to forget where the plug is.

3.5 hr fast charge

Plug in over a coffee. The removable battery charges anywhere, no dedicated station required.

Tuned chassis

A low centre of gravity and a stiffened frame keep every lane change quiet, composed, and entirely yours.

Specifications

The numbers
behind it.

Model One, as it ships. No trims to decode, no asterisks — this is the spec sheet, in full.

JVK · MODEL ONE
Range 120km
Top speed 70km/h
Charge time 3.5hrs
Motor power 2.5kW
Battery 60V / 32Ah Li-ion
Kerb weight 95kg
